# rubrik_feature_flag (Data Source)

The `rubrik_feature_flag` data source is used to check if a feature flag is enabled for
the RSC account.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Check if a feature flag is enabled for the RSC account.
data "rubrik_feature_flag" "flag" {
  name = "MY_FEATURE_FLAG"
}

output "enabled" {
  value = data.rubrik_feature_flag.flag.enabled
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Feature flag name.

### Read-Only

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the feature flag is enabled for the RSC account.
- `id` (String) SHA-256 hash of the feature flag name.
